hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
total_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    total_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
    total_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(total_cost<=2100)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
accommodation_position=''
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_position=activity_position(activity)
result=(poi_distance(target_city(plan), 'Window of the World', accommodation_position)<=2.143172493745594)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 2 people traveling from Shanghai to Nanjing for 3 days, meeting either of the following: 1. Total travel budget is 2100.0. 2. Accommodation should be within 2.15 km of Window of the World.
